creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag a sunset lover! 💛

We finally got to visit the new free viewing deck in Dubai that has gone viral on Insta last month. It’s a famous sunset spot but we arrived a little early so we had it to ourselves for nearly half an hour. 🥰

📍 near the Address Grand Creek Harbour 
🎟️ No entrance fee.
🚤 How to get there by public transportation? Take the RTA boat from Jaddaf Marine Station to Dubai Creek Harbour from 5pm onwards. Timings may change. Please check RTA website for updates.
